'''Ov Taraba''' was a [[University/Legends|university]] in the city [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] during the [[Beast Wars]] era of the planet. It was an expensive school, where the [[Minister of State]] [[Novar (Human)|Novar]] studied the art of diplomacy when he was young. This part of the city was controlled by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
